summary: Tested admin edit/delete time entry feature and mark-read notifications bug fix. Backend: 100% pass (43/43 tests). Frontend: All new features working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be child of <span>' - React rendering warning in table rows. Non-blocking but should be addressed for cleaner console.

details: Total hours auto-calculated when editing (verified ~3 hours calculation)
Edit modal opens with correct pre-filled data (employee name, clock_in, clock_out)
Edit modal saves changes with success toast 'Time entry updated successfully!'
Confirmation dialog appears 'Are you sure you want to delete this time entry?'
Frontend 'Mark all read' button works correctly
Employee cannot GET admin time entry (403)
Employee cannot PUT admin time entry (403)
Employee cannot DELETE admin time entry (403)

passed_tests: Admin can GET single time entry by ID
Admin can UPDATE clock_in time with auto total_hours recalculation
Admin can UPDATE clock_out time with auto total_hours recalculation
Admin can UPDATE both clock_in and clock_out simultaneously
Admin can DELETE time entry with confirmation
Employee cannot access admin time entry endpoints (403)
Mark-read notifications works with empty body
Edit modal opens with pre-filled datetime-local inputs
Edit modal shows note about auto-calculated hours
Save button submits changes and closes modal
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: When PUT /api/admin/time-entries/{id} receives empty body, it recalculates total_hours from existing clock_in/clock_out. This is acceptable idempotent behavior but could be documented.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test employees with unique UUIDs (edit_test_*, auth_edit_test_*, notif_test_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin edit/delete time entry feature fully tested and working. Backend has comprehensive pytest tests at /app/backend/tests/. All 43 tests pass. Console hydration warnings in AdminDashboard should be addressed eventually.

mocked_api.Resend email API: Using placeholder key re_123_placeholder - emails skipped in notification flow
